---
title: "Brainstorm models"
format: pdf
---

## Model discussed

Model 1: $\mathrm{ln}(price) = \beta_0 + \beta_1 \mathrm{ln}(market\_size)$

Model 2: $\mathrm{ln}(price) = \beta_0 + \beta_1 \mathrm{ln}(market\_size) + \beta_2 household\_income$

Model 3: $\mathrm{ln}(price) = \beta_0 + \beta_1 \mathrm{ln}(market\_size) + \beta_2 \mathrm{log}(household\_income)$


\

$\widehat{\mathrm{ln}(weekly\_median\_childcare\_price)} = \beta_0 + \beta_1 \mathrm{ln}(market\_size)$

$\widehat{\mathrm{ln}(weekly\_median\_childcare\_price)} = \beta_0 + \beta_1 \mathrm{ln}(market\_size) + \beta_2 median\_household\_income$
